<div><br></div>
<div>Things to do:</div>
<ul>
<li>See christmas lights - harrison boulevard - ne of oldest streets in boise with mansions </li>
<li>walk along the Boise river and parks (cold but pretty)</li>
<li>village lights shopping area  - lights</li>
<li>old penitentiary downtown - christmas plays</li>
<li>winter garden aglow </li>
<li>gaogle boise holiday event </li>
<li>Recording house </li>
<li>Toy store !</li>
<li>Greenleaf Farmer's Market Holiday Bazaar - Saturday, December 21, 2019 - Greenleaf Community Center 21513 Main St. Greenleaf, ID</li>
<li>2nd Annual Barzaar Saturday, December 21, 2019 10:00 am - 6:00 pm</li>
<li>Make gingerbread house!!</li>
<li>children museum meridian </li>
<li>botanical gardens - lights </li>
<li>zoo</li>
<li>Aquarium</li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Travel credit cards with point rewards</div>
<ul>
<li>Hilton aspire - give you $250 cash if you buy  a southwest ticket, then you  cancel flight and keep the  cash</li>
<li>Hyatt - gives you  two free nights at  any hyatt</li>
<li>The points guy - follow  him</li>
<li><br></li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div>Southwest (UEIXVD)</div>
<ul>
<li>number bags free</li>
<li>checking stroller</li>
<li>checking pack and play </li>
<li>checking car seat</li>
<li>rental car</li>
<li>weight of car</li>

<li>birth cert,shot record </li>
<li>can check stroller and carseat for free </li>
<li>pack and  play counts  as a bag </li>
<li>2 were bags and 1 cary on and personal item (diaper bag) </li>
<li>family boarding after A group</li>
</ul>
</ul>

<div>Bogus Basin  -Collette  </div>
<ul>
<li>Getting around </li>
<li>what to do with a kid</li>
<li>cost for ski/snow</li>
<li>lessons</li>
<li>total costs</li>
<ul>
<li>shuttles start  on  21st everyday until 24 </li>
<li>pick up from </li>
<li>3 stops </li>
<li>mountain coaster and tube hill - 38 inches </li>
<ul>
<li>ella rides with us</li>
<li>can be in  own  tube -</li>
</ul>
<li>shuttles at 7 am and 5 pm at  3 locations</li>
<li>new rideshare app - can see who is going an d how  many seats </li>
<li>rentals - half day price starts at 1 pm, </li>
<li>snowboardallday  32$, 27$ half </li>
<li>Ski rental same </li>
<li>rent at the top  of the mountain - first stop on your right </li>
<li>lockers - can maybe leave gear there in the  lodge - 2083325375 </li>
<li>lessons - 2083325340</li>
<ul>
<li>daily group - 1hr 45 min - 10, 12, 2 everyday </li>
<li>team and adult - lesson $49 </li>
<li>package - $99  rent gear and lesson and lift ticket </li>
<li>good to reserve before  </li>
</ul>
</ul>

<li>2 lodges</li>

<div>Car Rental $424</div>
<ul>
<li>Car seat cost</li>
<li>Type of car for safe snow</li>
<li>Type of carseat</li>

<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>Intermediate suv - Nissan Rogue - all wheel drive all weather tires good gas mileage </li>
<ul>
<li>Rav 4</li>
<li>nissan rouge </li>
<li>Vw Tiguan</li>
<li>Jeep Compass</li>
<li><b>Jeep Cherokees - safest</b><br></li>
<li>Ford escapes</li>
<li>Ford Edge</li>
<li>Mazda cs5/cx5</li>
</ul>
<li>Should be all wheel drive </li>
<li>Or compact </li>
<li>Full size cars - some  have alll wheel drive</li>
<ul>
<li>crystler 300</li>
<li>Ford Fusion - some </li>
<li>Dodge chargers - some </li>
</ul>
<li>Suv safer</li>
<li>No chains</li>
<li>Go slow even if they ride you - pull offend let them pass you</li>
<li>Tap on breaks donŐt slam on breaks</li>
<li>Can use engine break instead of brake to not stop tires - D1 D2 D3 - coming up to round corner coming down basin - d1 lowest go 321</li>
<li>Car rack - can rent at airport - </li>
<ul>
<li>Need intermediate SUV</li>
<li>$15/day</li>
<li>Can rent to airport after done </li>
</ul>
</ul>
